prompt: Three small translucent golden-amber glowing octopus creatures huddled together on a bare branch in a dark misty rainforest at night. They glow warmly against the cold blue darkness. Two of them have their tentacles intertwined for comfort. Each has TWO TALL STALKED EYES rising from their heads like snail stalks. They are small, alone, far from home. There is no nest yet — just three glowing bodies on a branch in the dark. Moody, atmospheric, the feeling of beginning something new in the wilderness.
